revision.comment: Created page with "New template I am working on * [[Ame no Mikage no Kami]] * [[Ame-no-Mahitotsu-no-Mikoto]] Shrines {{ill|Mikami Shrine|ja|御上神社}} Related gods {{ill|Hikoimasu no Ōkimi|ja|彦坐王}} {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|アマツヒコネ|lt=Amatsuhikone no Mikoto}} Ones idk if thery belong * [[Ame-no-ikutama-no-mikoto]]"
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
added [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Immanuelle moved page [[Mikami Faith]] to [[Template:Mikami Faith]]
Text replacement - "天活玉命}}" to "天活玉命|1=Ame-no-Ikutama}}"
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "天目一箇神}}" to "天目一箇神|1=Ame-no-Mahitotsu-no-Mikoto}}"
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Text replacement - "Ame-no-Mahitotsu Shrine" to "Ameichi Shrine"
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
Text replacement - "[[Category:11]]" to ""
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: remove deleted category Kami templates
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24271391609|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
